title: ilex dasyclada
intro: Ilex dasyclada, also known as the Dahurian holly or Japanese holly, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Ilex genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and berries, which contain compounds like querctrine and isosterol, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Ilex dasyclada is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Ilex dasyclada include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and other Eastern herbal practices.
